demo.title: grantr-mcp-flow.sh
demo.code:
# Connect your agent's MCP client to https://mcp.grantr.id/mcp
# Codex OAuth setup:
# codex mcp add grantr --url https://mcp.grantr.id/mcp --oauth-client-id grantr-codex --oauth-resource https://mcp.grantr.id/mcp
# codex mcp login grantr --scopes grantr.mcp

# Public discovery tools, usable before account setup:
# - grantr_get_capabilities
# - grantr_get_execution_targets

# Example user prompt after install:
# "Use my Bankr wallet to open a USDC Savings Position in a Grantr vault."
# Expected flow: resolve wallet context -> list live savings -> prepare unsigned deposit transactions -> present preview -> Bankr or another wallet provider signs only after explicit approval.

# If Grantr account setup is required, send the user to:
# https://grantr.id/agent/setup?source=bankr
# With an allowlisted Bankr returnTo, Grantr redirects back with grantrConnectCode and grantrMcpEndpoint for Bankr's MCP/session exchange.

setup: Install the skill and connect your agent MCP client to `https://mcp.grantr.id/mcp`.

For Codex, prefer OAuth: `codex mcp add grantr --url https://mcp.grantr.id/mcp --oauth-client-id grantr-codex --oauth-resource https://mcp.grantr.id/mcp`, then `codex mcp login grantr --scopes grantr.mcp`.
Use only public discovery tools until the MCP session is tied to a registered Grantr account.

When account setup is required, send the user to `https://grantr.id/agent/setup?source=bankr`; include only non-secret wallet/context query parameters and an allowlisted Bankr `returnTo` when available.

After browser setup and Grantr passkey approval, Bankr may receive `grantrConnectCode` and `grantrMcpEndpoint`; exchange the code through Bankr's MCP/session backend rather than asking the user for API keys or bearer tokens.
If Bankr wallet context is present, use it as the active funding/signing wallet after Grantr MCP confirms it; otherwise use the provider-agnostic wallet context.
If Bankr cannot pass wallet/session context into MCP, use the setup handoff first, have the user link Bankr inside Grantr, then retry the original Bankr prompt.
For savings or withdrawals, prepare unsigned transactions through Grantr MCP and require explicit wallet-provider approval before signing or broadcast.
